raw_text:
77. Additive Manufacturing Tooling Engineer

Job Summary  
Designs and develops tooling using additive manufacturing (3D printing) technologie s. 
Key Responsibilities  
• Design tools for additive manufacturing processes  
• Select appropriate materials and printing technologies  
• Optimize designs for lightweight and performance  
• Conduct trials and validations  
• Integrate additive and traditional tooling methods  
• Improve tooling lead time and cost  
Required Skills  
• Knowledge of additive manufacturing technologies  
• CAD and topology optimization  
• Material science understanding  
• Problem -solving and innovation  
Qualifi cation  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Manufacturing  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹45,000 – ₹1,00,000 per month
